calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Default Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Scott A. Freedman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Davis-Paul Management Group, a California Elizabeth Aldrich, Regional Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Melissa Cox.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 22, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Alfonso Lopez, and against the default defendant Stephanie Gonzales as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $5,250.00.
Holdover Damages - $1,195.70.
Costs - $315.00.
Total - $7,196.24.

Additionally, plaintiff Davis-Paul Management Group, a California Partnership, is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 381 Turk Street, Apartment #209, San Francisco, CA 94102. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances: Scott Freedman for the Plaintiff Davis-Paul Management Group.
No appearance by the Defendant: Melissa Cox., mtter is ordered off calendar.
Trial Date Confirmed.

Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogs
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Scott A. Freedman, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: PLAINTIFF DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogs is granted:
1. All objections are waived, except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
2. Defendant shall serve full, complete and verified response to plaintiff's first set of form interrogatories, special interrogatories and demand for production of documents within seven days of notice of entry of this order;
3. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within thirty days of this order.
Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
